creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #17)
Actually, I think setting boot_verbose=1 will give important extra info in this case (see the macro DPRINTF in /usr/src/sys/geom/part/g_part.c).  Try it and you'll see.

The problem with fstab is that you need to use rw,noauto as the options, not just noauto.  It's not very well documented, but every entry needs to include the mount type, e.g. ro or rw.
